Get Your Free ChexSystems Report & Score

A simple step-by-step guide for registering, generating, and sharing your reports.

100% Free

ChexSystems tracks your banking history (like a credit bureau, but for checking/savings accounts). By law, you can request your Consumer Disclosure Report and your Consumer Score Report for free, directly from chexsystems.com. Follow the steps below on your phone.

Heads up: Only use the official site, chexsystems.com. Some lookalike sites try to charge for this — it should never cost anything.
Part 1: Register Your Account
Create your free Consumer Portal login.
▶ Watch steps 2–3 in motion (tap to expand)

The pink dot shows exactly where each tap lands.

1
Open the Consumer Portal

Tap this link to open the ChexSystems Consumer page:

https://www.chexsystems.com/consumer

This opens in a new browser tab. Once you're there, just switch back to this tab to keep following along with the next steps.
2
Open the menu

Tap the menu icon (three lines) in the top right corner of the page.

3
Tap Register

In the menu that opens, tap "Register" next to the Login button.

4
Enter your personal details

Enter your full legal name exactly as it appears on your driver's license or state ID (first, middle, last, and suffix if applicable), then tap Continue.

5
Enter your address

Fill in your current address, city, state, and zip code, then tap Continue.

Once you've submitted your address, ChexSystems will verify your identity (usually a code sent by text or email, plus a few identity questions). Once verified, you're logged into your Consumer Portal dashboard — this is your home base for requesting both reports below.
Part 2: Generate Your Reports
Both reports are requested from the same menu, one after the other.
6
Open the menu

Once you're logged in, tap the 3-line menu icon in the top left corner of the page.

7
Tap "Request Reports"

This expands to show two options: Consumer Disclosure and Consumer Score Report.

8
Request the Consumer Disclosure report

Tap "Consumer Disclosure," review your details, and confirm the request. You'll get a confirmation screen with a reference ID — save that for your records.

9
Request the Consumer Score report

Go back to the menu, tap "Request Reports" again, then tap "Consumer Score Report." Tap Submit to confirm.

You'll get a confirmation screen with a reference ID — save that one too.

Both reports are usually available instantly in the portal, though occasionally they can take a few minutes to a few days to generate.
Part 3: Receive & Share Your Reports
Your reports arrive by email notice, not instantly in the portal.
10
Wait for the email

ChexSystems sends an email titled "New Correspondence Available From ChexSystems" once your reports are ready — this can take a few minutes.

11
Open the link and log in

Tap the "here" link in the email, then log in to the Consumer Portal with the username and password you created.

12
Open your correspondence

After logging in, scroll down to the Correspondence section and tap "View All Correspondence."

This opens a chart listing your reports. Tap directly on the reference number in the far-right column to open a report.

13
Download the report

With the report open, tap the menu icon in the top right and choose "Download."

Repeat step 12–13 for the second report — you need both the Disclosure report and the Score report.

14
Send both reports along

Once both files are downloaded, send both documents to whoever sent you these instructions.

Your report contains your SSN and personal details — only share it over a trusted, private channel (like a direct text or email), not a public link or group chat.
Guide for personal use · Always verify current steps at chexsystems.com
